posts.author: Richied77 (Rich Davies)
posts.cookedHtml:
Hi all,
Random question I’m hoping someone may be able to help with.
Our firewall team are currently trying to establish a connection between a Power BI on-premise server and the Monday.com API.
They have opened up the firewall to allow 104.16.11.42, but are seeing denies on 20.190.159.64 and 40.126.31.71.
Could someone please confirm if these IPs are part of api.monday.com/v2?
Just need confirmation of the IP’s we should be whitelisting to establish the connection.
Many thanks,
Rich

posts.author: Matias.Monday (Matias)
posts.cookedHtml:
Hello @Richied77 and welcome to the community!

I hope you like it here

Our API is protected by Cloudflare, which means that we don’t have dedicated IP addresses for inbound traffic.

Cloudflare’s shared IP ranges are available here: IP Ranges

I hope this helps!

Cheers,
Matias
